test_command: pnpm vitest run (full 1038 tests, DATABASE_URL=quanqn) + pnpm typecheck
notes: NOTE(env): Tests require DATABASE_URL=quanqn (not DATABASE_URL_TEST). prismaTest falls back to DATABASE_URL when DATABASE_URL_TEST unset — both prismaTest and prisma singleton hit same quanqn DB, which has quanqn_app GRANTs and RLS policies. Running with DATABASE_URL_TEST=quanqn_test causes cross-DB failures: prismaTest queries quanqn_test while prisma service writes to quanqn. This is pre-existing test design matching US-004/US-005 validator behavior. NOTE(quanqn_test migration): Applied 6 pending migrations to quanqn_test during validation — quanqn_test now up to date. NOTE(stale log cleanup): Validator env-config error during testing wrote actorAdminId=0 integration-test audit log to quanqn — cleaned up before final run. All 8 US-006 tests PASS. Typecheck exit_code=0.
